next_steps: Whole-body 18F-FDG PET-CT to identify metabolic activity and optimal biopsy sites
Image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass
Serum IgG4 level measurement and testing for BRAF V600E mutation
Water-deprivation test or serum osmolality and urine osmolality testing for diabetes insipidus
Detailed ophthalmologic examination for orbital involvement
Histopathological evaluation with immunohistochemical staining for CD68, CD1a, and S100
